# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  UserFilesBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: user-uploaded-files-bucket
      AccessControl: Private
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireObjectsAfter1Year
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            FunctionName: !GetAtt AppBackupLambda.Arn

  AppIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3FullAccessForApp
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:*
                Resource: !GetAtt UserFilesBucket.Arn

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket for user-uploaded files
    Value: !Ref UserFilesBucket
